characters.name: Beth Turner
characters.description: Beth TurnerBiographical InformationFull NameBeth TurnerAliasKate Nelson(episode 1)Age27StatusAlivePhysical InformationSpeciesHumanAbilities / GiftsNoneGenderFemaleHair ColorBlondeRelativesSignificant OthersJosh Lindsey(ex-boyfriend)†Mick St. John(boyfriend)AffiliationsOccupations / RolesReporter(former)InvestigatorAppearancesPortrayed BySophia MylesAppears InAll episodesType of RoleMain character Beth Turneris the star reporter forBuzzWire, an online news network. After encountering Mick at a crime scene and later a murder victim's apartment, they begin exchanging information on cases. Beth originally "met" Mick St John in 1985. Prior to meeting him at the murder scene of the first victim of "The Vampire Killer" (No Such Thing As Vampires), they had met when she was still a child. Beth Turner was abducted at age four and her mother hired Mick to find her. The kidnapper, Coraline (Mick St John's ex-wife), took her in an attempt to make Mick come back to her. Coraline believed that if she provided Mick with a vampire child he would never leave her.

characters.name: Coraline Duvall
characters.description: Coraline DuvallBiographical InformationFull NameCoraline DuvallAliasMorgan VincentAge200+Physical InformationSpeciesVampireGenderFemaleHair ColorDark brownRelativesSiblingsLance(brother)Five unnamed brothersSignificant OthersMick St. John(ex-husband)AffiliationsNationalityFrenchOccupations / RolesPhotographerAppearancesPortrayed ByShannyn SossamonType of RoleRecurring character Coraline DuvallisMick St. John's ex wife. She turned Mick into a vampire back in the 50's. By the 80's their marriage is on the rocks and ends when she kidnapsBeth Turner. Coraline planned on turning 4-year-old Beth into a vampire in an effort to give Mick the family he's always wanted (and also keep him from leaving her). Unknown to her, Mick was hired by Beth's mother to find her daughter. Mick tracks down the missing child and her kidnapper and makes it very clear to Coraline she will not be turning or keeping Beth. They fight and Mick stakes her and burns the house down with Coraline in it. Up until 2008 Mick believed her dead.

characters.name: Guillermo Gasol
characters.description: Guillermo GasolBiographical InformationFull NameGuillermo GasolStatusAlivePhysical InformationSpeciesVampireGenderMaleHair ColorBlackEye colorBrownAffiliationsOccupations / RolesMorgue attendantAppearancesPortrayed ByJacob VargasAppears InEpisode 1x01 - "No Such Thing as Vampires"Episode 1x03 - "Dr. Feelgood"Episode 1x13 - "Fated to Pretend"Episode 1x14 - "Click"Episode 1x16 - "Sonata"Type of RoleRecurring character Guillermo Gasolis a vampire supporting character in the TV seriesMoonlight. He works at a morgue and steals blood from dead bodies for himself andMick St. John, and presumably other vampires as well. He sometimes helps Mick with his cases by allowing him access to dead bodies. to be added

characters.name: Josef Kostan
characters.description: Josef KostanBiographical InformationFull NameJosef KostanAliasJosef KonstantinCharles FitzgeraldAge25+/400+Physical InformationSpeciesVampireGenderMaleRelativesSignificant OthersSarah Whitley(ex-fiancée)Lola(ex-lover)†AffiliationsOccupations / RolesHedge fund traderAppearancesPortrayed ByJason DohringType of RoleMain character Mick, please, I don't have the energy to kill everyone who pisses me off. I have to hire some people. Josef Kostan,néJosef Konstantin, is avampirein Los Angeles and the best friend ofMick St. John. He changed his last name to Kostan when he moved to Los Angeles.

characters.name: Josh Lindsey
characters.description: Josh LindseyBiographical InformationFull NameJosh LindseyStatusDeceased †Physical InformationSpeciesHumanAbilities / GiftsNoneGenderMaleRelativesSignificant OthersBeth Turner(girlfriend)AffiliationsOccupations / RolesDeputy District AttorneyAppearancesPortrayed ByJordan BelfiType of RoleRecurring character Josh Lindseyis a recurring human character in the TV seriesMoonlight. He andBeth Turnerhave been seeing each other for about a year at the beginning of the series, but Josh becomes increasingly insecure in their relationship as Beth gets closer toMick St. John. Josh is a deputy district attorney of Los Angeles, and Beth and Mick occasionally get involved with his cases. Josh is introduced as Beth's boyfriend.

characters.name: Mick St. John
characters.description: Mick St. JohnBiographical InformationFull NameMick St. JohnAge30(turned)84(first episode)[1]85(series finale)StatusAlivePhysical InformationSpeciesVampireGenderMaleRelativesSignificant OthersCoraline Duvall(ex-wife)Beth Turner(girlfriend)AffiliationsOccupations / RolesPrivate investigatorAppearancesPortrayed ByAlex O'LoughlinAppears InAll episodesType of RoleMain character Mick St. Johnis the main protagonist ofMoonlight. He is avampirewho works as a private investigator in Los Angeles, California. He is the ex-husband and vampire progeny ofCoraline Duvall. Prior to becoming a vampire, Mick was the young friend of Ray, and his wife, Lila In 1942, Ray and Mick (a medic) had fought in World War II together until Ray's shocking death. Mick then went back to the States, where after he had an affair with Lola until he heard that Ray was alive. It is unknown what happened after that period. Mick refuses to kill innocents and only drinks blood either from blood banks or from criminals. Because of his age and experience with humans, Mick is somewhat cynical to people who claim to have an open mind to those who are different. Given the era he was brought up in and his age, Mick can be seen as an old-fashioned.
